scripts.dev: npx concurrently -k "npx bun run client" "npx bun run worker"
scripts.dryrun:staging: bun run build:client && wrangler deploy --dry-run --env staging
scripts.dryrun:prod: bun run build:client && wrangler deploy --dry-run --env production
scripts.deploy:staging: bun run build:client && wrangler deploy --env staging
scripts.deploy:prod: bun run build:client && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply dojo_staging_db --remote --env staging
scripts.test: bun run create:test:db && bun test && bun run destory:test:db
